kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Username And Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And User Clicks The Login Button
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'And User Clicks The Login Button' found. Did you mean: keywords.When User Clicks The Login Button

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Inventory Page
And User Sees The Products List
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

When User Clicks Add To Cart For First Product
Then Product Is Added To Cart And Badge Shows
